sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73905" key="o(mo/fwktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμό-φωκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (φώζὠ</foreign> <sense id="n73905.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">roasted</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">parched together,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:3:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
